description: A funky, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and stylish straps, this pair looks great with day or party wear.  The colourful strap in suede will perfectly complement ethnic or Western outfits.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.UpperSmooth footbed with a soft suede effect circular insert at heel for comfortThong styled shape with colourful synthetic suede straps from midfoot to centreMetal ring connecting straps at centreHas a toe separator to comfortably hold the foot in placeOutsoleDurable shaped outsole Aggressive texturing on the heel for ultimate grip Sandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
